description_long: This object consists of three mobile electronic units, each mounted on a wheeled base with four stabilizing legs and a central housing. Each unit features a prominent vertical mast supporting an array of illuminated directional arrow panels, likely used for traffic control or signaling. The housings are colored gray, blue, and yellow, each marked with a number and equipped with visible wiring connecting the mast to the base. The arrow panels are black and yellow, designed for high visibility, and are adjustable in orientation. The bases have robust wheels and extendable feet for stability, suggesting they are designed to be deployed temporarily on roads or construction sites. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal and plastic, with some rubber components on the wheels and feet.
description: A set of three mobile electronic traffic control units with colored housings, wheeled bases, and illuminated directional arrow panels mounted on vertical masts.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three units side by side, highlighting the colored housings and the upright arrow panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view displaying the numbered housings and the side profile of the arrow panels, with visible wiring and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the housings and the structure of the masts, with the arrow panels seen from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side of the units, with clear visibility of the stabilizing legs and the arrow panels' mounting.
